headline: Data Scientist & Technical Translator
intro_bi: End-to-end data exploration, feature engineering, and strategic dashboard architecture tailored for corporate telemetry.
intro_translation: High-precision translation, software internationalization, and cross-cultural versioning for technology enterprises.
intro_about: Linguistic computing developments, continuous academic specializations, and published literary translations.

projects_bi.title: 2024 - 2025 | Industrial Data Engineering (ArcelorMittal)
projects_bi.desc: Engineered automated data pipelines using SQL and Python to extract and process over 10k monthly rows of raw industrial data for advanced operational auditing.

projects_bi.title: 2023 - 2024 | Data Automation & Telemetry (Vale S.A.)
projects_bi.desc: Automated key performance indicators (KPIs) by constructing custom data workflows, deploying responsive data architectures directly into strategic corporate dashboards.

projects_translation.title: 2025 - Pres. | Web Localization (Leonardo Murakami's Platform)
projects_translation.desc: Executed end-to-end website localization, internationalization testing, and cross-cultural translation to adapt web assets for global users and ensure seamless multilingual deployment.

projects_translation.title: 2015 - Pres. | Technical Localization & Partnerships
projects_translation.desc: Partnered with international delegations (including Canadian and Mexican engineering groups), executing machine translation evaluation (MTPE) and cross-lingual technical documentation audits.

projects_about.title: 2023 - Pres. | AI Translation Research (CTecL)
projects_about.desc: Coordinating CTecL as an independent initiative, investigating how large language models (LLMs) and advanced NLP tools handle poetic rhythm, meter, and cultural nuances across multilingual corpora.

projects_about.title: 2025 | Published Literary Translation
projects_about.desc: Co-translated and published the book 'Ora ga haru: minha primavera' (2025), applying advanced linguistic frameworks to preserve structural and rhythmic styles.

projects_about.title: 2012 - 2023 | Continuous Specialized Education (IFES)
projects_about.desc: Operating gracefully where computational data meets human language. Holds a Computer Science Technical Diploma, a Licentiate degree in Letters, and a Graduate Certificate in Special Education Management from IFES.
